Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER across all rework loops
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to be followed by Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants that include at least one prior approval by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and the subsequent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time it takes Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in cases that eventually reach Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER is performed in variants containing multiple rejection cycles
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER compared to the time of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in similar process paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to Request Payment in successfully completed cases after resubmission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in cases that do not involve a Budget Owner approval step
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time it takes the Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to be done after the first submission in multi-rejection variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'
